runners.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by a nose at this track over 450m (25.93) beating Aston Transcend in Grade 5 on April 6. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (26.42) when fourth over 460m at Geelong in a Rank Limit - Grade 5. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed five times. Will need some luck to feature.

runners.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior went down fighting at double figure odds when second (24.44) over 425m at Bendigo. Draws an inside box and is worth plenty of thought.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost ground turning out of back straight.
Checked turning out of front straight and tailed off.

runners.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.3 lengths over 450m at Shepparton in a handy 25.96, beating Aussie Flame. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with him.
